---
title: "UC MRE Activity Risk Stratification"
description: "Bayesian multilevel model for triage-oriented ulcerative colitis activity scoring from MRE"
date: 2025-12-01
categories: [Bayesian, IBD, ulcerative colitis, Streamlit]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Live]{.project-status .live}

## Problem

Segment-level MRE findings in ulcerative colitis need to be translated into actionable risk categories that account for patient-level clustering and calibration. Standard approaches treat segments independently and ignore the hierarchical structure of the data.

## Approach

A Bayesian multilevel model incorporating patient-level clustering and calibrated evaluation, translated into a triage-oriented MRE risk stratification workflow. The model integrates GIQuant-derived motility with bowel wall imaging markers and validates against the Mayo Endoscopic Subscore. Presented as a Streamlit clinician-facing research prototype.

## Status

Associated with the ESGAR 2026 oral presentation on MRE-derived risk stratification. Manuscript in preparation.

## Links

- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/uc-mre-risk-tool)
- [Zenodo DOI]

:::
